emails.subject: RE: LOI Stagecoach
emails.body: RE: LOI Stagecoach Gerald, Can I bring a copy of the Stagecoach LOI on Enron letterhead to you for you= r=20 signature? Chris Hilgert said that we need your initials or signature,=20 including Jean Mrha=01,s. Where on the document would you sign or initial?= I=20 would like to get this out to El Paso today. Thanks, John

emails.subject: RE: LOI Stagecoach

emails.subject: RE: LOI Stagecoach
emails.body: Yes, I will just initial by the signature line that Jean signs. =09John Kiani/ENRON@enronXgate =0904/17/2001 10:13 AM =09=09=20 =09=09
